title: Hypurr Hour
summary_title: Hyperliquid EVM goes live, precompiles delayed, Felix lending protocol incoming
summary_description: Aaron from Felix breaks down the stealth EVM launch, missing features, and the lending infrastructure coming to Hyperliquid.

key_moments.label: EVM announced mid-night, caught builders off-guard with stealth launch
Only HYPE transfers between L1 and EVM; general-purpose smart contracts live
Precompiles not yet live, blocking oracle access and L1-EVM compatibility
Aaron woken at 6am by Charlie: EVM is live, now scrambling to ship Felix
Price oracles, safe multisig, and native USDC missing from day-one EVM
Felix: borrow stables against HYPE to trade perps, spot, or earn carry trade yield
Tsunami of pent-up liquidity waiting for lending markets to unlock leverage
Precompiles expected within a week; full EVM feature rollout expected in two weeks
